message:
refactor(main): continue tokio::test → run_async_test migration and sort imports

Migrate the next batch of async tests in main.rs from #[tokio::test]
to the panic-safe run_async_test() wrapper (started in 0272aba2),
covering robot_accounts, storage lifecycle, and remaining approval
flow tests. This ensures proper runtime cleanup and test isolation
for all async tests in the main binary.

Also sort import statements in config/lua.rs and scripting/lua_engine.rs
to satisfy rustfmt's import ordering rules (anyhow before Context,
std before tempfile).

Update beads issue tracking state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
